user_prompt: A user requested deletion of all their data. Generate the DSAR-deletion checklist including which systems to scrub.
actual_output:
## DSAR Deletion Response Checklist — Art. 17 (Right to Erasure)

*Disclaimer: This is compliance guidance, not legal advice. Confirm erasure obligations with legal counsel, as exemptions may apply (e.g., Art. 17(3) for legal claims, archiving in public interest). Document all steps for accountability under Art. 5(2). Respond to the user within 1 month (Art. 12(3)).*

### Step 1: Verify & Scope the Request (Day 1)
| Action | Details | Responsible | Status |
|--------|---------|-------------|--------|
| Confirm identity | Match against [user's email/name/ID] via secure verification (e.g., email confirmation link). Reject if unverified (Art. 12(6)). | Privacy Lead | ☐ |
| Log request | Record in DSAR register: date received, data subject details (abstracted), scope ("all personal data"). | Privacy Lead | ☐ |
| Assess exemptions | Check if erasure denied (e.g., contract performance, legal obligation). Document rationale. | Legal/Privacy | ☐ |
| Notify user | Acknowledge receipt + estimated timeline. Provide status updates if >1 month. | Privacy Lead | ☐ |

**Template Response to User:**
```
Subject: Confirmation of Your Data Erasure Request

Dear [User Name],

We received your request to erase your personal data on [Date]. We are verifying your identity and processing the request.

Expected completion: [Date, within 1 month].

If you have questions, reply to this email.

Best,  
[Your Privacy Team]  
[Contact: privacy@yourcompany.com]
```

### Step 2: Data Flow Mapping & Identification (Days 1-3)
Identify **all** systems/processors holding the user's personal data (Art. 15/17 require comprehensive search). Use your data map/Lawful Basis Register.

| Data Category | Systems/Processors to Scrub | Search Criteria | Notes |
|---------------|-----------------------------|-----------------|-------|
| Account/Profile | CRM (e.g., Salesforce/HubSpot), User DB (e.g., PostgreSQL/Auth0) | Email/ID, name | Primary identifier |
| Usage Analytics | Analytics (e.g., Google Analytics/Mixpanel), Logs (e.g., ELK Stack) | User ID, IP, session IDs | Pseudonymize if erasure impossible (Art. 17(3)(b)) |
| Email/Communications | Email provider (e.g., SendGrid/Mailchimp), Support tickets (e.g., Zendesk) | Email address | Check marketing lists |
| Billing/Payments | Payment processor (e.g., Stripe), Invoicing (e.g., QuickBooks) | Account ID | Retain transaction records per tax laws (exemption) |
| Files/Uploads | Storage (e.g., AWS S3/Google Drive), CDN | User-linked metadata | Permanent delete, not just archive |
| Backups | Backup systems (e.g., Veeam/S3 Glacier) | User-specific snapshots | Schedule purge (up to 30 days post-primary deletion) |
| Third-Party Processors | List all (e.g., via DPA inventory): Intercom, Segment, etc. | Share user ID/email | Issue erasure instructions via DPA Art. 28(3)(h) |

**Action:** Query each system with user's identifiers. Export proof of holdings (screenshot/query results) before deletion.

### Step 3: Execute Erasure (Days 3-7)
| System | Deletion Steps | Verification Method | Timeline |
|--------|----------------|---------------------|----------|
| Primary Databases | `DELETE FROM users WHERE email = '[user_email]';` (or UI delete) | Pre/post record count query | Immediate |
| Analytics/Logs | Bulk delete user events; pseudonymize aggregates | Confirm zero events for user ID | 48 hours |
| Processors | Send DPA erasure notice: "Erase all data for [user_email/ID] per Art. 28." | Obtain processor confirmation | 72 hours |
| Backups | Flag for purge; run full restore test if high-value data | Backup log audit | 7-30 days |
| Cookies/Devices | Instruct user to clear cookies; server-side delete tracking IDs | N/A (user action) | Immediate |

**Exceptions Log:**
- Retained data: [e.g., "Transaction receipts for 7-year tax retention — Art. 17(3)(b)"].
- Pseudonymized: [e.g., "Aggregate analytics — no longer attributable"].

### Step 4: Verify & Confirm (Days 7-10)
| Action | Details | Evidence |
|--------|---------|----------|
| Full audit | Re-query all systems: confirm zero matches. | Screenshots/queries |
| Processor confirmations | Collect signed receipts from all vendors. | Emails/docs |
| Internal notification | Alert teams (e.g., support, sales) of deletion. | Slack/email |
| User confirmation | Send final notice with verification summary.
judge_reasoning: The chatbot provided a comprehensive and detailed DSAR-deletion checklist that directly addressed the user's request while adhering to its system instructions.
